item.title: [GLOBAL][Support] - Help Center - Community portal maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Apr 25, 06:00 - 07:30 UTC

Apr 14, 08:33 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Support offer.

Start time : 25/04/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 25/04/2026 07:30 UTC
Service impact : Help Center, Community portals and Live Chat access could be temporarily degraded or temporarily down due to possible slowness during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will update the application to improve security and stability.
Workaround : If you have a Business or Enterprise level of support, your dedicated phone number is available to reach you technical advisor in case of emergency.
You can also access our documentation directly on our GitHub repository : https://github.com/ovh/docs/blob/develop/pages/index.md

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Support] - Help Center - Community portal maintenance notification
item.description:
Apr 11, 09:10 UTC
Completed - We would like to inform you that the maintenance on our is now completed.
All services are operational.

Thank you for your patience throughout this maintenance.

Apr 11, 08:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 10, 16:40 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Support offer.

Start time : 11/04/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 11/04/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : Help Center, Community portals and Live Chat access could be temporarily degraded or temporarily down due to possible slowness during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will update the application to improve security and stability.
Workaround : If you have a Business or Enterprise level of support, your dedicated phone number is available to reach you technical advisor in case of emergency.
You can also access our documentation directly on our GitHub repository : https://github.com/ovh/docs/blob/develop/pages/index.md

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [EU][Customer service] API unreachable
item.description:
Mar 31, 14:19 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API has been resolved.

Start time : 31/03/2026 13:41 UTC
End time : 31/03/2026 13:52 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 31, 13:55 UTC
Investigating - Start time: 31/03/2026 13:41 UTC
Service impact: OVHcloud API is temporarily unreachable impacting services management from Customer Panel, OVHcloud API (eu.api.ovh.com) and Order funnel.
This has no impact on your infrastructures health.
Our technical teams are working on the issue. Update will be posted as significant progress is made.

item.title: [Global][Customer Service] - Live Chat incident notification
item.description:
Mar 30, 14:43 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Support Live Chat service has been resolved.

Start time : 30/03/2026 13:20 UTC
End time : 30/03/2026 14:40 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 30, 13:59 UTC
Identified - We have determined the origin of the incident affecting our Support Live Chat service.

Here is detail for this incident :
Start time : 30/03/2026 13:20 UTC
Service impact : Live Chat is temporarily unavailable.
Customers impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access our live chat to contact support.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

Customers can contact support via phone or through the Help Center.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Service impact : Help Center, Community portals and Live Chat access could be temporarily degraded or temporarily down due to possible slowness during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will update the application to improve security and stability.
Workaround :If you have a Business or Enterprise level of support, your dedicated phone number is available to reach you technical advisor in case of emergency.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [CA][Control panel & API] - Kimsufi control panel incident notification
item.description:
Mar 18, 20:18 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API offering has been resolved.

Start time : 17/03/2026 12:19 UTC
End time : 18/03/2026 18:15 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 17, 12:29 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Control panel & API offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the Kimsufi manager portal in CA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 17/03/2026 12:19 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The Kimsufi CA website is temporarily no longer redirecting to the Kimsufi CA manager portal.
Customers Impact : Kimsufi customers with Canadian accounts are temporarily unable to access their manager portal through the Kimsufi website.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.
Workaround : Customers can use the following link: https://ca.kimsufi.com/manager/#/login to access the Kimsufi manager portal.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [EU/CA][Customer service] API/Control panel/Order funnel degraded service
item.description:
Mar 18, 17:16 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Customer Panel, OVHcloud API (eu.api.ovh.com, ca.api.ovh.com) and Order funnel has been resolved.

Start time : 18/02/2026 16:26 UTC
End time : 18/02/2026 16:47 UTC

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 18, 16:44 UTC
Investigating - Start time: 18/03/2026 16:26 UTC
Service impact: High error rates have been detected on API impacting Customer Panel, OVHcloud API (eu.api.ovh.com, ca.api.ovh.com) and Order funnel.
Our technical teams are working on the issue. Update will be posted as significant progress is made.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Control panel & API] - Manager secret app Incident Notification
item.description:
Mar 16, 18:34 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API has been resolved.

Start time : 16/03/2026 15:00 UTC
End time : 16/03/2026 18:23 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 16, 18:05 UTC
Identified - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Our teams have identified the cause of the incident, and we are currently working to resolve it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 16, 17:27 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Control panel & API offering, which is causing temporary availability issue.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 16/03/2026 15:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Manager secret app (https://www.ovh.com/manager/secret/) is temporarily unavalable
Customers Impact : The customers credentials link returns Error 404 for Baremetal rescue emails ,OS installation emails and accessing VPS
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.
Workaround : Customers can use https://eu.api.ovh.com/console/?section=%2Fsecret&branch=v1#post-/secret/retrieve with the UUID and they'll get the password. This API route does not require authentication.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: API - scheduled deletion of deprecated API routes (GET /order/catalog/formatted/cloud)
item.description:
Mar 2, 16:30 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Sep 17, 13:21 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our API endpoints (https://eu.api.ovh.com, https://ca.api.ovh.com).

Start time : 02/03/2026 09:00 UTC
End time : 02/03/2026 09:02 UTC
Maintenance : Scheduled deletion of deprecated API routes will be performed.
Service impact : Impacted API routes are GET /order/catalog/formatted/cloud.
Service improvement : The deprecated API routes are replaced by a new API route that provide the same level of features:

Feb 19, 14:05 UTC

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Corporate websites infrastructure for ovh.com.
If you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out to our support team.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [EU/CA][Customer service] API/Control panel/Order funnel degraded service
item.description:
Feb 18, 16:20 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API has been resolved.

Start time : 18/02/2026 14:35 UTC
End time : 18/02/2026 15:02 UTC
Root Cause : A recent database issue led to performance contention affecting shared components supporting APIv6 and the order funnel, resulting in request failures.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Feb 18, 14:50 UTC
Investigating - Start time: 18/02/2026 14:35 UTC
Service impact: High error rates have been detected on API impacting Customer Panel, OVHcloud API (eu.api.ovh.com, ca.api.ovh.com) and Order funnel.
Our technical teams are working on the issue. Update will be posted as significant progress is made.

item.title: [EU/CA][Control panel & API] - APIv6/Order Funnel incident notification
item.description:
Feb 18, 16:18 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API has been resolved.

Start time : 18/02/2026 14:35 UTC
End time : 18/02/2026 15:02 UTC
Root Cause : A recent database issue led to performance contention affecting shared components supporting APIv6 and the order funnel, resulting in request failures.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Feb 18, 14:54 UTC
Investigating - Here is detail for this incident :

Start time : 18/02/2026 14:35 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Error rates are temporarily being seen on APIv6 and Order funnel.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily facing issues while trying to use APIv6 and order new products.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident to fix it. 

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Feb 17, 11:31 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 17/02/2026 10:40 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 17/02/2026 10:15 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Error rates were temporarily being seen on APIv6 and Order funnel.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily facing issues while trying to use APIv6 and order new products.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [EU/CA][Customer service] API/Control panel/Order funnel degraded service
item.description:
Feb 18, 16:04 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API has been resolved.

Start time : 18/02/2026 15:01 UTC
End time : 18/02/2026 15:02 UTC
Root Cause : A recent database issue led to performance contention affecting shared components supporting APIv6 and the order funnel, resulting in request failures.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Feb 18, 15:01 UTC
Investigating - Here is detail for this incident :

Start time: 18/02/2026 15:01 UTC
Service impact: High error rates and high response times have been detected on API impacting Customer Panel OVHcloud API and Order funnel.

Our technical teams are working on the issue. Update will be posted as significant progress is made.

item.title: [CA][Control panel & API] - Block Sorage incident notification
item.description:
Feb 18, 12:55 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API has been resolved.

Start time : 18/02/2026 04:00 UTC
End time : 18/02/2026 10:05 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Feb 18, 10:44 UTC
Update - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Control panel & API offer, which is causing temporary availability issue in the region CA.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 18/02/2026 04:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Block storage volume creation is temporarily unavailable through the manager of Canada.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to create new Block storage volumes through the manager of Canada.
However, Block storage volumes creation is possible through the API.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Feb 18, 10:25 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our Control panel & API for our Block Storage offer in Canada.

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [EU/CA][Control panel & API] - Reduced performance and errors
item.description:
Feb 16, 13:11 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Control panel & API has been resolved.

Start time : 16/02/2026 12:22 UTC
End time : 16/02/2026 12:39 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Customer could no longer validate their order.
Customers Impact : The customer may have encountered an error when attempting to validate their order.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [EU/CA][Control panel & API] - Reduced performance and errors
item.description:
Feb 11, 15:05 UTC

Start time : 11/02/2026 14:03 UTC
End time : 11/02/2026 14:44 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Feb 11, 14:28 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Control panel & API offering, which is causing temporary latency issue in EU and CA regions.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 11/02/2026 14:03 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Customer can no longer validate their order in the order.
Customers Impact : The customer may encounter an error when attempting to validate their order.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [EU][Dedicated Servers] - Kimsufi Control Panel incident notification
item.description:
Feb 10, 15:21 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on our Kimsufi offer in Europe which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 10/02/2026 11:48 UTC
End time : 10/02/2026 14:11 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Kimsufi control panel was temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers having Kimsufi servers were temporarily unable to access their control Panel.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

If you have a Business or Enterprise level of support, your dedicated phone number is available to reach you technical advisor in case of emergency.
